heading: ***HEAT ADVISORY IN THE CT VALLEY EAST THROUGH NH FROM WHITE RIVER AND PLYMOUTH SOUTH THIS AFTERNOON AND EVENING***Today
text: Morning clouds east and north of I-89, a few passing showers, breaking for periods of sun. West and south, some sun, then more clouds with a few local showers and thunderstorms. Highs in the 80s, from 80 to 90 north to south. Winds light, becoming west up to 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Periods of clouds, with a few localized showers or a thunderstorm. Continued warm and muggy. Lows in the 60s to near 70. Winds diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Friday
text: Periods of sun and clouds. Hot and humid. Scattered afternoon showers or locally strong thunderstorms developing, mostly in NY, reaching western VT late. Highs in the upper 80s to low 90s. Winds light, becoming south to southwest 5 to 15 mph.
